summary.zh-CN: 本版本改进聊天工作区、默认消息布局、本地文件预览，并同步桌面端 stable 更新与对外产品资产。
summary.en-US: This release improves the chat workspace, default message layout, local file previews, and aligns the desktop stable update with refreshed public product assets.

body.zh-CN: 文件和任务材料可以更自然地留在当前对话旁边。
body.en-US: Files and task materials can stay closer to the active conversation.

body.zh-CN: 聊天消息默认更适合扫读，长任务线程更清楚。
body.en-US: Chat messages are easier to scan by default, especially in longer task threads.

body.zh-CN: 工作区、附件和消息表面的文件预览使用更一致的展示方式。
body.en-US: Workspace, attachment, and message file previews now use a more consistent presentation.

body.zh-CN: 桌面端 stable 通道已发布 runtime bundle 0.22.4，桌面壳版本为 0.0.220。
body.en-US: The desktop stable channel now ships runtime bundle 0.22.4 with desktop shell 0.0.220.

body.zh-CN: GitHub README、产品截图和社群入口已同步到当前产品体验。
body.en-US: GitHub README, product screenshots, and community entry points now match the current product experience.

title.zh-CN: npm 包 UI 资产补齐

body.zh-CN: 已发布的 nextclaw npm 包包含最新 CLI launcher UI 资产。
body.en-US: The published nextclaw npm package includes the refreshed CLI launcher UI assets.

title.zh-CN: 下载入口与 stable manifest 对齐
title.en-US: Download fallback and stable manifest aligned

body.zh-CN: 桌面端 stable manifest 与官网下载 fallback 已指向同一个正式桌面版本。
body.en-US: Desktop stable manifests and website download fallbacks point to the same stable desktop release.

body.zh-CN: 本版本不需要手动迁移。
桌面端 stable 更新继续兼容 0.0.141 及以上 launcher。
body.en-US: Stable desktop updates remain compatible with launcher 0.0.141 and newer.
